name: node-red-contrib-velux
description: Node-RED nodes for the Velux KLF-200 io-homecontrol gateway. Maintained fork of PLCHome/node-red-contrib-velux with vendored velux-klf200 + velux-klf200-api, TLS fingerprint pinning (survives the 2026-07-12 factory cert expiry) and crash fixes.

scripts.test: node test/load.test.js && node test/tls-pin.test.js && node test/leak.test.js
